send.c(3) Library Functions Manual send.c(3)

NAME

send.c - ACIP protocol packet sending functions (transport-agnostic).

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE (25 * 1024 * 1024)

Functions


asciichat_error_t packet_send_via_transport (acip_transport_t *transport, packet_type_t type, const void *payload, size_t payload_len, uint32_t client_id)
Send packet via transport with proper header (exported for generic wrappers). asciichat_error_t packet_receive_via_transport (acip_transport_t *transport, packet_type_t *type, void **payload, size_t *payload_len, void **alloc_buffer)
Receive a packet via transport with header parsing and validation. asciichat_error_t acip_send_audio_batch (acip_transport_t *transport, const float *samples, uint32_t num_samples, uint32_t batch_count)
Send audio batch packet. asciichat_error_t acip_send_audio_opus (acip_transport_t *transport, const void *opus_data, size_t opus_len)
Send Opus-encoded audio packet. asciichat_error_t acip_send_audio_opus_batch (acip_transport_t *transport, const void *opus_data, size_t opus_len, const uint16_t *frame_sizes, uint32_t frame_count, uint32_t sample_rate, uint32_t frame_duration)
Send batched Opus-encoded audio frames. asciichat_error_t acip_send_ping (acip_transport_t *transport)
Send ping packet. asciichat_error_t acip_send_pong (acip_transport_t *transport)
Send pong packet. asciichat_error_t acip_send_error (acip_transport_t *transport, uint32_t error_code, const char *message)
Send error message packet. asciichat_error_t acip_send_remote_log (acip_transport_t *transport, uint8_t log_level, uint8_t direction, const char *message)
Send remote log packet. asciichat_error_t acip_send_session_created (acip_transport_t *transport, const acip_session_created_t *response)
Send SESSION_CREATED response packet. asciichat_error_t acip_send_session_info (acip_transport_t *transport, const acip_session_info_t *info)
Send SESSION_INFO response packet. asciichat_error_t acip_send_session_joined (acip_transport_t *transport, const acip_session_joined_t *response)
Send SESSION_JOINED response packet.

Detailed Description

ACIP protocol packet sending functions (transport-agnostic).

Implementation of send functions that work with any transport. Refactored from lib/network/av.c to use transport abstraction.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file send.c.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE (25 * 1024 * 1024)

Referenced by packet_send_via_transport().

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t acip_send_audio_batch (acip_transport_t * transport, const float * samples, uint32_t num_samples, uint32_t batch_count)

Send audio batch packet.

Parameters

transport Transport instance
samples Audio samples (float array)
num_samples Number of samples
batch_count Number of batches aggregated

Returns

ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure

Definition at line 181 of file send.c.

182                                                               {
183   if (!transport || !samples || num_samples == 0) {
184     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
185   }
186 
187   // Build batch header
188   audio_batch_packet_t header;
189   header.batch_count = batch_count;
190   header.total_samples = (uint32_t)num_samples;
191   header.sample_rate = (uint32_t)AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE;
192   header.channels = 1;
193 
194   // Calculate total size (header + float samples)
195   size_t samples_size = num_samples * sizeof(float);
196   size_t total_size = sizeof(header) + samples_size;
197 
198   uint8_t *buffer = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, total_size);
199   if (!buffer) {
200     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate buffer");
201   }
202 
203   // Copy header and samples
204   memcpy(buffer, &header, sizeof(header));
205   memcpy(buffer + sizeof(header), samples, samples_size);
206 
207   asciichat_error_t result = packet_send_via_transport(transport, PACKET_TYPE_AUDIO_BATCH, buffer, total_size, 0);
208 
209   buffer_pool_free(NULL, buffer, total_size);
210   return result;
211 }




References AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE,
    audio_batch_packet_t::batch_count, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    buffer_pool_free(), audio_batch_packet_t::channels,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_MEMORY,
    packet_send_via_transport(), PACKET_TYPE_AUDIO_BATCH,
    audio_batch_packet_t::sample_rate, SET_ERRNO, and
    audio_batch_packet_t::total_samples.


Referenced by client_send_thread_func(), and
    threaded_send_audio_batch_packet().






asciichat_error_t acip_send_audio_opus
  (acip_transport_t * transport, const void * opus_data, size_t
  opus_len)


Send Opus-encoded audio packet.


Parameters


transport Transport instance


opus_data Opus-encoded audio data


opus_len Length of encoded data


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 213 of file send.c.


213                                                                                                             {
214   if (!transport || !opus_data || opus_len == 0) {
215     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
216   }
217 
218   // Convert single opus frame to batch format (frame_count=1) with standard parameters
219   // Standard: 48kHz sample rate, 20ms frame duration
220   uint16_t frame_sizes[1] = {(uint16_t)opus_len};
221   return acip_send_audio_opus_batch(transport, opus_data, opus_len, frame_sizes, 1, 48000, 20);
222 }






References acip_send_audio_opus_batch(),
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, and SET_ERRNO.






asciichat_error_t acip_send_audio_opus_batch
  (acip_transport_t * transport, const void * opus_data, size_t opus_len,
  const uint16_t * frame_sizes, uint32_t frame_count,
  uint32_t sample_rate, uint32_t frame_duration)


Send batched Opus-encoded audio frames.


Parameters


transport Transport instance


opus_data Opus-encoded data (multiple frames concatenated)


opus_len Total length of encoded data


frame_sizes Array of individual frame sizes


frame_count Number of frames in batch


sample_rate Sample rate in Hz


frame_duration Duration per frame in milliseconds


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 224 of file send.c.


226                                                                       {
227   if (!transport || !opus_data || !frame_sizes || frame_count == 0) {
228     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
229   }
230 
231   // Build batch header (16 bytes)
232   uint8_t header[16];
233   *(uint32_t *)(header + 0) = HOST_TO_NET_U32(sample_rate);
234   *(uint32_t *)(header + 4) = HOST_TO_NET_U32(frame_duration);
235   *(uint32_t *)(header + 8) = HOST_TO_NET_U32(frame_count);
236   *(uint32_t *)(header + 12) = 0; // reserved
237 
238   // Calculate sizes array size
239   size_t sizes_len = frame_count * sizeof(uint16_t);
240   size_t total_size = sizeof(header) + sizes_len + opus_len;
241 
242   uint8_t *buffer = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, total_size);
243   if (!buffer) {
244     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate buffer");
245   }
246 
247   // Build packet: header + sizes + opus_data
248   memcpy(buffer, header, sizeof(header));
249 
250   // Convert frame sizes to network byte order before copying
251   // IMPORTANT: Server expects network byte order and will apply NET_TO_HOST_U16()
252   uint16_t *sizes_buf = (uint16_t *)(buffer + sizeof(header));
253   for (uint32_t i = 0; i < frame_count; i++) {
254     sizes_buf[i] = HOST_TO_NET_U16(frame_sizes[i]);
255   }
256 
257   memcpy(buffer + sizeof(header) + sizes_len, opus_data, opus_len);
258 
259   log_info("★ OPUS_BATCH_SEND_DEBUG: header=16, frame_count=%u, sizes_len=%zu, opus_len=%zu, TOTAL=%zu", frame_count,
260            sizes_len, opus_len, total_size);
261 
262   asciichat_error_t result = packet_send_via_transport(transport, PACKET_TYPE_AUDIO_OPUS_BATCH, buffer, total_size, 0);
263 
264   buffer_pool_free(NULL, buffer, total_size);
265   return result;
266 }






References buffer_pool_alloc(), buffer_pool_free(),
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_MEMORY, HOST_TO_NET_U16,
    HOST_TO_NET_U32, log_info, packet_send_via_transport(),
    PACKET_TYPE_AUDIO_OPUS_BATCH, and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by acip_send_audio_opus(),
    client_send_thread_func(), and
    threaded_send_audio_opus_batch().






asciichat_error_t acip_send_error (acip_transport_t
  * transport, uint32_t error_code, const char * message)


Send error message packet.


Parameters


transport Transport instance


error_code Error code from
  asciichat_error_t


message Error message (will be truncated to
  MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 302 of file send.c.


302                                                                                                          {
303   if (!transport) {
304     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid transport");
305   }
306 
307   // Calculate message length (max MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH)
308   size_t msg_len = 0;
309   if (message) {
310     msg_len = strlen(message);
311     if (msg_len > MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH) {
312       msg_len = MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH;
313     }
314   }
315 
316   error_packet_t header;
317   header.error_code = HOST_TO_NET_U32(error_code);
318   header.message_length = HOST_TO_NET_U32((uint32_t)msg_len);
319 
320   // Allocate buffer for header + message
321   size_t total_size = sizeof(header) + msg_len;
322   uint8_t *buffer = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, total_size);
323   if (!buffer) {
324     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate buffer");
325   }
326 
327   // Build packet
328   memcpy(buffer, &header, sizeof(header));
329   if (msg_len > 0) {
330     memcpy(buffer + sizeof(header), message, msg_len);
331   }
332 
333   asciichat_error_t result = packet_send_via_transport(transport, PACKET_TYPE_ERROR_MESSAGE, buffer, total_size, 0);
334 
335   buffer_pool_free(NULL, buffer, total_size);
336   return result;
337 }






References buffer_pool_alloc(), buffer_pool_free(),
    error_code, error_packet_t::error_code,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_MEMORY, HOST_TO_NET_U32,
    MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH, error_packet_t::message_length,
    packet_send_via_transport(), PACKET_TYPE_ERROR_MESSAGE, and
    SET_ERRNO.

    acds_websocket_client_handler(), and
    disconnect_client_for_bad_data().

asciichat_error_t acip_send_remote_log
  (acip_transport_t * transport, uint8_t log_level, uint8_t
  direction, const char * message)


Send remote log packet.


Parameters


transport Transport instance


log_level Log level (0=DEBUG, 1=INFO, 2=WARN, 3=ERROR)


direction Direction hint (0=client->server, 1=server->client)


message Log message


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 339 of file send.c.


340                                                             {
341   if (!transport || !message) {
342     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid transport or message");
343   }
344 
345   size_t msg_len = strlen(message);
346 
347   remote_log_packet_t header;
348   header.log_level = log_level;
349   header.direction = direction;
350   header.flags = 0;
351   header.message_length = HOST_TO_NET_U32((uint32_t)msg_len);
352 
353   size_t total_size = sizeof(header) + msg_len;
354 
355   uint8_t *buffer = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, total_size);
356   if (!buffer) {
357     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate buffer");
358   }
359 
360   // Build packet
361   memcpy(buffer, &header, sizeof(header));
362   // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-not-null-terminated-result) - binary packet data
363   memcpy(buffer + sizeof(header), message, msg_len);
364 
365   asciichat_error_t result = packet_send_via_transport(transport, PACKET_TYPE_REMOTE_LOG, buffer, total_size, 0);
366 
367   buffer_pool_free(NULL, buffer, total_size);
368   return result;
369 }






References buffer_pool_alloc(), buffer_pool_free(),
    remote_log_packet_t::direction, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_MEMORY, remote_log_packet_t::flags,
    HOST_TO_NET_U32, remote_log_packet_t::log_level,
    remote_log_packet_t::message_length,
    packet_send_via_transport(), PACKET_TYPE_REMOTE_LOG, and
    SET_ERRNO.

asciichat_error_t packet_receive_via_transport
  (acip_transport_t * transport, packet_type_t * type, void **
  payload, size_t * payload_len, void ** alloc_buffer)


Receive a packet via transport with header parsing and validation.
    Transport counterpart to packet_receive(). Receives raw bytes via
    transport, parses the packet header, validates magic/CRC32, and returns the
    packet type and payload separately.




Parameters


transport Transport instance


type Packet type from header


payload Pointer to payload data within the received buffer


payload_len Payload length from header


alloc_buffer Buffer to free when done (caller must free with
  SAFE_FREE)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 122 of file send.c.


123                                                                                          {
124   if (!transport || !type || !payload || !payload_len || !alloc_buffer) {
125     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters for packet_receive_via_transport");
126   }
127 
128   *type = 0;
129   *payload = NULL;
130   *payload_len = 0;
131   *alloc_buffer = NULL;
132 
133   // Receive raw bytes via transport
134   void *recv_buffer = NULL;
135   size_t recv_len = 0;
136   asciichat_error_t result = acip_transport_recv(transport, &recv_buffer, &recv_len, alloc_buffer);
137   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
138     return result;
139   }
140 
141   // Parse packet header
142   if (recv_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
143     log_warn("packet_receive_via_transport: packet too small (%zu bytes, need %zu)", recv_len,
144              sizeof(packet_header_t));
145     if (*alloc_buffer) {
146       buffer_pool_free(NULL, *alloc_buffer, recv_len);
147       *alloc_buffer = NULL;
148     }
149     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Received packet smaller than header");
150   }
151 
152   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)recv_buffer;
153   *type = (packet_type_t)NET_TO_HOST_U16(header->type);
154   size_t plen = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->length);
155 
156   if (recv_len < sizeof(packet_header_t) + plen) {
157     log_warn("packet_receive_via_transport: truncated packet (header says %zu payload, got %zu total)", plen, recv_len);
158     if (*alloc_buffer) {
159       buffer_pool_free(NULL, *alloc_buffer, recv_len);
160       *alloc_buffer = NULL;
161     }
162     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Truncated packet payload");
163   }
164 
165   if (plen > 0) {
166     *payload = (uint8_t *)recv_buffer + sizeof(packet_header_t);
167   }
168   *payload_len = plen;
169 
170   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
171 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_free(),
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL,
    packet_header_t::length, log_warn, NET_TO_HOST_U16,
    NET_TO_HOST_U32, SET_ERRNO, and
  packet_header_t::type.


Referenced by __attribute__(),
    client_crypto_handshake(), discovery_session_process(),
    discovery_session_start(), and
    session_server_like_handshake().






asciichat_error_t packet_send_via_transport
  (acip_transport_t * transport, packet_type_t type, const void *
  payload, size_t payload_len, uint32_t client_id)


Send packet via transport with proper header (exported for generic
    wrappers). Send arbitrary packet via transport (generic packet sender).




Wraps payload in ACIP packet header and sends via transport.
    Handles CRC32 calculation and network byte order conversion.




Parameters


transport Transport instance


type Packet type


payload Payload data (may be NULL if payload_len is 0)


payload_len Payload length


client_id Client ID to include in packet header


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 41 of file send.c.


42                                                                                     {
43   if (!transport) {
44     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid transport");
45   }
46 
47 // Sanity check: catch suspiciously large packets (likely a bug)
48 #define MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE (25 * 1024 * 1024) // 25 MB
49   if (payload_len > MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE) {
50     log_error("★ PACKET_SIZE_VALIDATION_FAILURE: Attempting to send %zu bytes (%zu MB) with type=%d (0x%04x), exceeds "
51               "max %d bytes (25 MB) - likely a bug in caller's length calculation",
52               payload_len, payload_len / (1024 * 1024), type, type, MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE);
53     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Packet payload too large: %zu bytes (max 25MB)", payload_len);
54   }
55 
56   log_info("★ PACKET_SEND_VIA_TRANSPORT START: type=%d (0x%04x), payload_len=%zu bytes, client_id=%u, transport=%p",
57            type, type, payload_len, client_id, (void *)transport);
58 
59   // Build packet header
60   packet_header_t header;
61   header.magic = HOST_TO_NET_U64(PACKET_MAGIC);
62   header.type = HOST_TO_NET_U16(type);
63   header.length = HOST_TO_NET_U32((uint32_t)payload_len);
64   header.client_id = client_id;
65 
66   // Calculate CRC32 if we have payload
67   if (payload && payload_len > 0) {
68     header.crc32 = HOST_TO_NET_U32(asciichat_crc32((const uint8_t *)payload, payload_len));
69     log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: CRC32=0x%08x calculated for %zu byte payload", header.crc32, payload_len);
70   } else {
71     header.crc32 = 0;
72     log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: No payload, CRC32=0");
73   }
74 
75   log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: magic=0x%016llx, type=%d, length=%u bytes, client_id=%u", header.magic, type, header.length,
76             header.client_id);
77 
78   // Calculate total packet size
79   size_t total_size = sizeof(header) + payload_len;
80   log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: Header=%zu bytes + Payload=%zu bytes = Total=%zu bytes", sizeof(header), payload_len,
81             total_size);
82 
83   // Allocate buffer for complete packet
84   uint8_t *packet = SAFE_MALLOC(total_size, uint8_t *);
85   if (!packet) {
86     log_error("★ PACKET_SEND: Memory allocation FAILED for %zu byte packet buffer", total_size);
87     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate packet buffer");
88   }
89 
90   log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: Packet buffer allocated at %p", (void *)packet);
91 
92   // Build complete packet: header + payload
93   memcpy(packet, &header, sizeof(header));
94   if (payload && payload_len > 0) {
95     memcpy(packet + sizeof(header), payload, payload_len);
96     log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: Payload copied to buffer offset %zu", sizeof(header));
97   }
98 
99   // Send via transport (transport handles encryption if crypto_ctx present)
100   // Transport does NOT take ownership - it only copies data to its own buffers
101   log_info("★ PACKET_SEND: Calling acip_transport_send with %zu total bytes", total_size);
102   asciichat_error_t result = acip_transport_send(transport, packet, total_size);
103 
104   if (result == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
105     log_info("★ PACKET_SEND_VIA_TRANSPORT COMPLETE: SUCCESS - sent %zu bytes (type=%d, client_id=%u)", total_size, type,
106              client_id);
107   } else {
108     log_error("★ PACKET_SEND_VIA_TRANSPORT FAILED: acip_transport_send returned error %d (%s) when sending %zu bytes "
109               "type=%d to client_id=%u",
110               result, asciichat_error_string(result), total_size, type, client_id);
111   }
112 
113   // Always free the packet buffer
114   SAFE_FREE(packet);
115   return result;
116 }






References asciichat_crc32, ASCIICHAT_OK,
    packet_header_t::client_id, packet_header_t::crc32,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_MEMORY, HOST_TO_NET_U16,
    HOST_TO_NET_U32, HOST_TO_NET_U64,
    packet_header_t::length, log_debug, log_error,
    log_info, packet_header_t::magic,
    MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE, PACKET_MAGIC, SAFE_FREE,
    SAFE_MALLOC, SET_ERRNO, and packet_header_t::type.


Referenced by acip_send_ascii_frame(),
    acip_send_audio_batch(), acip_send_audio_opus_batch(),
    acip_send_capabilities(), acip_send_clear_console(),
    acip_send_client_join(), acip_send_client_leave(),
    acip_send_error(), acip_send_image_frame(),
    acip_send_image_frame_h265(), acip_send_ping(),
    acip_send_pong(), acip_send_protocol_version(),
    acip_send_remote_log(), acip_send_server_state(),
    acip_send_session_created(), acip_send_session_info(),
    acip_send_session_joined(), acip_send_stream_start(),
    acip_send_stream_stop(), client_crypto_handshake(),
    client_send_thread_func(),
    crypto_handshake_client_key_exchange(),
    crypto_handshake_rekey_complete(),
    crypto_handshake_rekey_request(),
    crypto_handshake_rekey_response(),
    crypto_handshake_server_auth_challenge(),
    crypto_handshake_server_complete(),
    crypto_handshake_server_send_parameters(),
    crypto_handshake_server_start(),
    discovery_session_become_host(),
    discovery_session_handle_host_disconnect(),
    discovery_session_process(), discovery_session_start(),
    discovery_session_stop(), threaded_send_audio_opus(),
    threaded_send_image_frame_h265(), threaded_send_packet(), and
    websocket_client_send_packet().








Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.11.0
    ascii-chat
